message: build: enable cgo for darwin releases

files.patch:
@@ -21,3 +21,16 @@ jobs:
         run: go test ./...
       - name: Lint
         run: make lint
+
+  darwin-cgo-build:
+    runs-on: macos-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
+        with:
+          go-version-file: go.mod
+          cache: true
+      - name: Test
+        run: go test ./...
+      - name: Build (Keychain / cgo)
+        run: CGO_ENABLED=1 go build ./cmd/gog

@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   goreleaser:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    runs-on: macos-latest
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
         uses: actions/checkout@v4

@@ -12,7 +12,6 @@ builds:
     env:
       - CGO_ENABLED=0
     goos:
-      - darwin
       - linux
       - windows
     goarch:
@@ -21,10 +20,21 @@ builds:
     ignore:
       - goos: windows
         goarch: arm64
+  - id: gog_darwin
+    main: ./cmd/gog
+    binary: gog
+    env:
+      - CGO_ENABLED=1
+    goos:
+      - darwin
+    goarch:
+      - amd64
+      - arm64
 
 archives:
   - builds:
       - gog
+      - gog_darwin
     format: tar.gz
     name_template: "{{ .ProjectName }}_{{ .Version }}_{{ .Os }}_{{ .Arch }}"
     format_overrides:

@@ -2,11 +2,7 @@
 
 ## 0.4.1 - Unreleased
 
-### Added
-
-### Fixed
-
-### Changed
+- macOS: release binaries now built with cgo so Keychain backend works (no encrypted file-store fallback / password prompts; Issue #19).
 
 ## 0.4.0 - 2025-12-26
